\tzpentry{ID3673}{Grav Quantum Charge Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3673 introduces Grav Quantum Charge Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\hat{Q}_{\text{grav}} = (\hbar c^3/8\pi G)\int_{-\infty}^t [\partial I/\partial\tau - \partial S/\partial\tau]\exp[-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}]d\tau$
\]
